# saasutils_gobright_integration (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `external_system` (String) Integration type. One of `openid` (GoBright externalSystem=14) or `office365` (=1).
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `oidc` (Block, Optional) OIDC configuration. The block is required; `fromModel` returns an error if it is omitted. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--oidc))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `new_id` (String)

<a id="nestedblock--oidc"></a>
### Nested Schema for `oidc`

Required:

- `audience` (String)
- `issuer` (String)
- `public_key` (String)
- `related_user_integration_id` (Number)
- `token_replay_prevention_mode` (Boolean) GoBright `oidcTokenReplayPreventionMode` projected to a boolean (false=0, true=1).
- `user_identifier_claim_name` (String)
- `validation_mode` (Boolean) GoBright `oidcValidationMode` projected to a boolean (false=0, true=1).

Read-Only:

- `jwks_endpoint` (String)
